isi.lyrics:
Lyric ARTMS - Verified Beauty

Romanization

Walkin’ In The Lights Tonight
nal bichul ttae
I’m Walkin’ In The Lights Tonight
Yeah I'm Glowin’ Babe

dan han beonui Cut
mangseorim eopsi Show It
ppeonhan Type geureon geon Not My Style
Walkin’ In The Lights Tonight
neon bomyeon dwae

So Criminal
kkumyeonaeji aneun Visual
My Original
hwanhui nal neukkyeobwa

meomchun siseon
nal gaginsikil ttae Like Flash Flash
Like Flash
Make It True
As You Know It
Verified It Yeah

jogeum deo ppajyeodeureo
You’ll Wanna Dive Into The Deep End
neukkyeobwa neukkyeobwa Feel My Vibe
hwaryeohan sunggan soge
heundeullim eopsi bitnal Beauty

Twenty-Four, Uh Huh
And Three Six Five, La La
binteumeun eopseo, Me Ya
baraeji aneul namanui
saegi damgin Face

No Rules, Uh Huh
Candid Words, That’s Right
nae bonyeon Glow, So Fine
Verified Beauty

Reckless

I Don’t Need A Frame

isi.lyrics:
Lyric ARTMS - Obsessed

Romanization

areumdaun Blue wambyeokhan Rose
mami kkaeeona gidaryeo Bloom
gamchwoon Truth jigeumkkeot Hide
ijeya pieona

You’ve Got Me
jeomjeom jeomjeom jeomjeom deo
Bring New Light
jom deo byeogeul Knock Knock Knock
Can’t Stop That

tto dareun segyee
ppajyeodeureoga nae mam
Oh I Can’t Stop Now

Flame kkok sumgyeowatdeon mami gyeolguk
taoreul geot gateun bamiya
Face saeron ne moseube
sumi cha Wait
3, 2, 1

jeomjeom jeomjeom jeomjeom jeomjeom deo
No No No No No No Not Enough

i natseon gamjeong
kkeuteopsi neomchyeo
neoege nan Obsessed
ije sumgil su eopseo

I’m Standing Here
Oh Oh Oh
Nah I Ain't Gonna Find
Addicted To Love
gangnyeolhan kkeullim sogeseo
Oh Obsessed With Love

Wake Up nege Send A Clue
tto dareun nareul bwa
ne siseoni daeul got
eodirado
Just You Don’t Get It

jeomjeom jeomjeom jeomjeom jeomjeom deo
No No No No No No Not Enough

i natseon gamjeong
kkeuteopsi neomchyeo
neoege nan Obsessed
ije sumgil su eopseo

I’m Standing Here
Oh Oh Oh
Nah I Ain't Gonna Find
Addicted To Love

gangnyeolhan kkeullim sogeseo
Oh Obsessed With Love

Just Glow Up
Oh saekdareun saekkallo
nal muldeurilge ije

Just Say It
I’m Ready To Accept It
Now

Yeah nal gadeuk chaeun Feel Feel Feel Feel Feel
negero bichul bit bit bit bit bit
nal pagodeureo Deep Deep Deep Deep Deep

I Want You
eoduun bami omyeon
jeomjeom jeomjeom jeomjeom jeomjeom deo
No No No No No No Not Enough

nae mam gipeun got
bitnaneun Prism
neoege nan Obsessed
ije meomchul su eopseo

Hangeul

아름다운 Blue 완벽한 Rose
맘이 깨어나 기다려 Bloom
감춰온 Truth 지금껏 Hide
이제야 피어나

You’ve Got Me
점점 점점 점점 더
Bring New Light
좀 더 벽을 Knock Knock Knock
Can’t Stop That

또 다른 세계에
빠져들어가 내 맘
Oh I Can’t Stop Now

Flame 꼭 숨겨왔던 맘이 결국
타오를 것 같은 밤이야
Face 새론 네 모습에
숨이 차 Wait
3, 2, 1

점점 점점 점점 점점 더
No No No No No No Not Enough

이 낯선 감정
끝없이 넘쳐
너에게 난 Obsessed
이제 숨길 수 없어

I’m Standing Here
Oh Oh Oh
Nah I Ain't Gonna Find
Addicted To Love
강렬한 끌림 속에서
Oh Obsessed With Love

Wake Up 네게 Send A Clue
또 다른 나를 봐
네 시선이 닿을 곳
어디라도
Just You Don’t Get It

점점 점점 점점 점점 더
No No No No No No Not Enough

이 낯선 감정
끝없이 넘쳐
너에게 난 Obsessed
이제 숨길 수 없어

I’m Standing Here
Oh Oh Oh
Nah I Ain't Gonna Find
Addicted To Love

강렬한 끌림 속에서
Oh Obsessed With Love

Just Glow Up
Oh 색다른 색깔로
날 물들일게 이제

Just Say It
I’m Ready To Accept It
Now

Yeah 날 가득 채운 Feel Feel Feel Feel Feel
네게로 비출 빛 빛 빛 빛 빛
날 파고들어 Deep Deep Deep Deep Deep

I Want You
어두운 밤이 오면
점점 점점 점점 점점 더
No No No No No No Not Enough

내 맘 깊은 곳
빛나는 Prism
너에게 난 Obsessed
이제 멈출 수 없어

isi.lyrics:
Lyric ARTMS - Icarus

Romanization

nal chajajwo
nan taeyange nogeun Wings
kkeuteomneun Falling
modeun geosi bultaolla

eoreumgati chagaun bulkkochui walcheu
dasi kkaeeona
I Just Wanna Be Unchained

Stay Unchained
sumjugin chae pogineun eopseo
i miro soge gathin nalgaereul dasi pyeolchyeo

Flame
tabeorin kkeuteseo
saeropge tansaengeul kkumkkwo

Hurricane
dasi hambeon deo Fly Away
jageun nalgae deo keuge Spread
sesangeul bakkul nae nalgaetjit
neoreul hyanghaeseo Fly
La La La La La
La La La La La

deo ajjilhae
nal derigo gallae Winds
kkeuteomneun bihaeng
dalbicheun deo chaolla

nuni busin saeroun segyero deo dagaga
dasi taeeona
I Just Wanna Be Unchained

Stay Unchained
chagapjiman ttaseuhan bit deurui chum
i yeolgi pume anggo nalgaereul dasi pyeolchyeo

Flame
sikji anneun jaet bit kkumgwa
tabeorin kkeuteseo
saeropge tansaengeul kkumkkwo

Hurricane
dasi hambeon deo Fly Away
jageun nalgae deo keuge Spread
sesangeul bakkul nae nalgaetjit
neoreul hyanghaeseo Fly
La La La La La

Reborn Like A Phoenix’ Wing
We Fly High The World Awakening Us

Once Again
gyesokdwae Endless Mind Game
neowa hamkke dasi tto Play
sesangeul bakkul nae nalgaetjit
neoreul hyanghaeseo Fly
La La La La La

Reborn Like A Phoenix’ Wing
Ah Ah
Reborn Like A Phoenix’ Wing
La La La La La

Reborn Like A Phoenix’ Wing
Ah Ah
Reborn Like A Phoenix Wing
Ah Ah
Ah

Hangeul

다시 깨어나

Stay Unchained
숨죽인 채 포기는 없어
이 미로 속에 갇힌 날개를 다시 펼쳐

Flame
타버린 끝에서
새롭게 탄생을 꿈꿔

작은 날개 더 크게 Spread

너를 향해서 Fly

La La La La La

더 아찔해

끝없는 비행

다시 한번 더 Fly Away

너를 향해서 Fly
